name: Ozon Impact
tagline: Electric blue gradient with floating 3D objects, orbit rings, heavy white type, lime-green and hot-pink accents. Maximum visual impact.

palette.description: deep navy to electric blue gradient background; lime-green and hot-pink 3D ornaments; pure white heavy type

typography.style: ultra-heavy display sans; stark white on dark; maximum contrast

best_for: Product launches, recruitment campaigns, tech conferences, company introductions. Any deck that needs to command attention and project brand confidence.
avoid_for: Dense data tables, academic papers, soft consumer content that needs lightness.
navigation: inline keyboard handler, dot indicators, touch + wheel
